in the afternoon, i would drive the fort worth cultural district. i would visit the kimbell art musuem, which has a manageable collection and impressive archotecture. afterward, i would spend some time walking through the fortw orth botanic garden. this would create a good balance between indoor sightseeing and relaxing outdoors. for lunch, i would choose a nearby barbecue

i would leave early in the morning and begin at the fort worth stockyards. after breakfast at a local cafe, i would walk through the historic district, explore the western style shops and watch the cattle dirve. the stockyards would be a good way to exp the city cowboy hitsoyr wihtout needding a tighly planned schedule.
